signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, below market forecasts of 2.4%, as reported by Statistics Korea via Trading Economics[1][2]. This data, released recently, aligns with a Bank of Korea video update noting 2.2% consumer price growth amid Middle Ea
